title: Smoky Chewy Irish Sausage Pie
description: A kid-friendly Irish dish featuring smoked turkey sausage in a buttery phyllo crust, with a savory, smoky filling that melts in your mouth.
instructions: In a skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add sliced sausage and cook until lightly browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Fold in peas, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, cooking for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and let the mixture cool slightly.
Lay one phyllo sheet on a clean surface, brushing it lightly with remaining olive oil; repeat with 23 more sheets, stacking them.
Spread the sausage mixture over half the stacked phyllo, sprinkle with shredded cheese and chopped parsley.
Fold the other half of the phyllo over the filling, sealing edges with a bit of olive oil.
Place the assembled pie on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden and crisp.
Let cool for 5 minutes, slice, and serve warm.
